Name: LPUPS Case Panel
Description: LattePanda UPS monitoring and control — battery status, power draw, network toggle, and system diagnostics.

com.lpups.casepanel.battery.Name: Battery Status
com.lpups.casepanel.battery.Tooltip: B1 (18650 UPS) and B2 (12V LiON pack) capacity, state, and charging indicator.

com.lpups.casepanel.power.Name: Power and Runtime
com.lpups.casepanel.power.Tooltip: Live power draw in Watts and estimated minutes remaining on the 12V pack.

com.lpups.casepanel.network.Name: Network Mode
com.lpups.casepanel.network.Tooltip: Toggle between WiFi-first and Cellular-first routing priority. Both adapters stay active.

com.lpups.casepanel.events.Name: UPS Events
com.lpups.casepanel.events.Tooltip: Last event from the Arduino UPS — charger connected/disconnected, kick-in, shutdown trigger.

com.lpups.casepanel.system.Name: System Control
com.lpups.casepanel.system.Tooltip: Tap to initiate shutdown (with 4-second confirm). Hold 2.5 seconds to restart.

com.lpups.casepanel.diagnostics.Name: Diagnostics
com.lpups.casepanel.diagnostics.Tooltip: Run 15 system sanity checks. Shows pass/warn/fail summary. Tap result to open detailed report.
